mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, user_id, knowledge_base_id, title, last_message_at, gmt_create, gmt_modified, is_deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO session (id, tenant_id, user_id, knowledge_base_id, title, last_message_at, gmt_create, gmt_modified, is_deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{userId}, #{knowledgeBaseId}, #{title}, #{lastMessageAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)
